race.comment: GETS THE GIRLS (1) just missed from the back at Ascot and then got to within 2L in stronger than this at Scarpside-Pinjarra. Finally draws and inside barrier and is well placed to take this out. GODSEND LADY (10) resumes off much stronger and is well placed to feature if presented on song. Has a wide gate but led the latest over 1200m and should skip across okay. BOUTIQUE SESSION (6) resumed in better grade at Geraldton and need the run off the long break. Has won 3/3 second-up and a much better effort is likely. MAXINE'S WISH (5) has been knocking on the door at York and drawn low can get some of the money. WORKING CLASS GIRL (14) peaks and won't be far away.
